name: Calhoun Pickleball Center- Calhoun Park & Rec
description: Calhoun Rec Department Courts, no organized play. You may book a court through the Calhoun Rec Department. Cost $5/hour.

name: Pickleball 706
description: Indoor Pickleball Club, Pickleball706.com, Opened May 17, 2025, 8 indoor Courts, Indoor Skinny Singles Court, Titan Ball Machine, Picklehead Lounge area, Joola Game Zone with Ping Pong & Foosball, Full Programming, Membership is not required.
open_play_schedule: Full Programming & Open Play, DUPR Days, Tournaments, Round Robins, & Court Reservations available
fees: Fee required — Day Member (Fee Charged)  or Memberships available.
